name: cable standing one arm triceps extension
instructions: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Hold the cable handle with your right hand, palm facing down, and position your arm so that it is fully extended and parallel to the ground.
Keep your elbow stationary and close to your body.
Slowly bend your elbow, lowering the cable handle towards the back of your head.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then extend your arm back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform the exercise with your left arm.

Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine. Hold the cable handle with your right hand, palm facing down, and position your arm so that it is fully extended and parallel to the ground. Keep your elbow stationary and close to your body. Slowly bend your elbow, lowering the cable handle towards the back of your head. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then extend your arm back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform the exercise with your left arm.

conditionNotes.note: Keep load symmetrical and stop at positions that create sharp pain or twisting.
Use pain-free range of motion, slower tempo, and lighter progressions when joints feel irritated.
Weight-bearing resistance exercises are beneficial for bone density when load is appropriate.
Maintain neutral spine and avoid positions that aggravate the lower back.
Maintain consistent breathing throughout. Avoid breath-holding.
Both aerobic and resistance training improve insulin sensitivity. Monitor blood sugar before, during, and after sessions. Have a fast-acting carb available.
Rhythm-based exercises and large-amplitude movements are beneficial. Focus on motor confidence.
Focus on muscle co-contraction and joint stability. Avoid locking out joints passively.
Functional patterns are generally safe. Prioritize pelvic floor awareness and avoid Valsalva.
Start light with higher reps and shorter ROM. Progress load gradually as pain-free capacity increases.
